case.title: Promoter/RBS Context for Expression Tuning
case.workflow: Use annotation and translation context to discuss why expression output depends on more than the CDS alone.

records.name: lacZ_alpha_fragment
records.origin: lacZ alpha fragment from the classic blue-white screening system associated with cloning vectors such as pUC19.
records.why_it_matters: This fragment is a perfect teaching example of phenotype-linked DNA: inserting the wrong thing into the wrong place changes colony color.

records.name: EGFP_CDS
records.origin: Engineered fluorescent reporter derived from the Aequorea victoria GFP family.
records.why_it_matters: EGFP is a canonical lab reporter: great for teaching translation, cloning, sequence verification, and how a few codons can change an optical phenotype.
